label: micro perf • cold-load latency: unload → reload → first token, 3 reps
query: Reply with the single word READY.
notes: The model-swap cost row. Each rep evicts the resident model (ModelRuntime.clearAll) then times a fresh load through to first token, so the median cold TTFT is exactly the latency a user pays when switching models. A warm rep is measured afterward for the swap-penalty contrast (cold median − warm). Trend telemetry only — cold-load time is model-size- and machine-specific, so there are no hard floors; the diff/history tooling is the gate. SKIPs on hosts whose run model is not a local MLX model (nothing to unload). Off-CI (needs a local model).
